examples: You need manual dexterity to be good at video games.
Although full integration of sound into movies was complete by 1930, it would take a bit longer for films to regain their stylistic elegance and dexterity.
His manual dexterity and fine spatial skills were wasted on routine tasks.
He uses an unorthodox, angular, herky-jerky delivery that relies more on dexterity than power.
There is also a narcissistic delight in verbal dexterity, in dealing out the trenchant phrase.
